genre: Idle-action deckbuilder / real-time card battler / meta-progression collection game

product_direction.identity: Stay firmly in the idle-action deckbuilder space rather than becoming a traditional dense TCG simulator.
product_direction.run_structure: Mostly linear for now, with more dungeons and content routes later.
product_direction.progression_goal: Break typical TCG-like rules piece by piece through major upgrades and automation unlocks.
product_direction.content_priority: Prioritize content breadth and variety first, deeper systems second.
product_direction.power_curve: Fast satisfying power climb with a large amount of long-term content.

architecture.root: Single monolithic App component. ALL gameplay sub-components (Card, CombatStatusPanel, CombatTopMap) and render functions (renderMenu, renderCombat, etc.) MUST remain inside the App function to share state scope and avoid rendering/state bugs.
architecture.asset_paths: Static assets and CSV files should be resolved via import.meta.env.BASE_URL. Use getAssetPath() when loading from public/ for GitHub Pages compatibility.

CARD_DB.structure: { id, name, type, cost, color, value, desc, icon, optional manaBonus/multiHit/isHeal }

SKILL_TREE_DICT.desc: Node definitions with costs, dependencies, and mutation functions for meta state

features: Monster timer ticks up and deals damage when reaching maxTimer
Player mana regens based on meta.regenRate
autoDraw and autoPlayMana logic executes in the combat loop
activeEffects, enemyAttackEffects, floatingDrops, and drawAnimations are time-filtered for CSS/VFX cleanup

card_play.logic: Deduct cost, apply card effect, resolve damage/heal/shield/draw, award GP/Fragments/Packs on kill, then advance run-map state.

progression_map.generation: Array of 1000 nodes. Boss every 5th combat milestone. 5% Treasure, 5% Rest. Forced unlocks at index 2 (Skills) and 4 (Shop). Default Encounter otherwise.
progression_map.ui: Sliding horizontal timeline sliced around the current node to avoid DOM lag.

events.interaction: In-arena holographic event object. Combat pauses while the event is active.
events.resolution: Claim rewards, show popup, apply unlock/reward state, then continue map progression.

working_features: Map progression with events and bosses
recent_vfx_and_ui_progress: Varied slash directions with stronger melee impact
Faster ranged attacks with more forceful muzzle flash
Hit stop that scales with stronger attacks
Mana wisps gathering into the MP counter
Delayed damage and healing behavior on HP bars
Curved hex-panel shield wall for block cards
Block overlay integrated into the player HP bar
Deck-to-hand draw effect with deck pulse, flying ghost card, and landing pulse

current_focus.main_goal: Polish combat readability, impact, and card-flow presentation before moving to larger new systems.
current_focus.next_likely_task: Finish stabilizing the draw-card effect so the moving hologram frame matches the ghost card during flight.

known_issues: The moving cyan hologram frame in the draw-card deck-to-hand animation is still visually misaligned during flight.
The landing pulse for the drawn card appears correct, so the remaining issue is specifically the in-flight frame alignment.

cards.body: Dark holographic card shell with type-colored outer frame
cards.foil: Rare and legendary foil treatments based on cost tiers

hud.style: Black/cyan cyber panels with heavy glow accents and clear combat readability

effects.direction: High-impact but readable, with strong feedback on attacks, mana gain, healing, block, and draw flow

strict_constraints: Do NOT use external image URLs. Use lucide-react icons only.
Do NOT extract gameplay sub-components outside the main App() function unless absolutely necessary.
Keep event rendering and pause logic strict so combat fully pauses during active events.
Do NOT create random verification output folders under the project root. Reuse .build-check for build verification.
Do NOT use npx tailwindcss init in this project.
